item.title: Migration import (ChatGPT + Google Assistant)
item.intent: Import ChatGPT and Google Assistant exports so migrating users start with preferences intact on day 1. All processing local, PII masked.
item.description: MIGRATION STORY: Lowers the barrier for Privacy Migrants coming from ChatGPT or Google Assistant. Extracting preferences from export data means the forged agent already knows the user's patterns on day 1. PII masking during import keeps sensitive data local. Cron mapping from routines is the key value-add — not just importing preferences but translating them to scheduled jobs. Acceptance: ChatGPT export parsed; preferences extracted via Ollama; routine → cron mapping produced; PII masked; import completes without network calls.
steps: Parse Google Assistant data export format
Extract user preferences via local Ollama
Map exported routines to cron job definitions
Apply PII masking during import processing
acceptanceCriteria: Import completes without any network calls
